meta.title: 4 Days Bali ATV Adventure & Sunset Dinner Cruise from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel
meta.description: 4-day Bali ATV adventure package from Malaysia. Tanah Lot temple, 1-hour ATV quad bike through jungle and rice fields, Kintamani volcano views, Garuda Wisnu Kencana, and Phinisi sunset dinner cruise. From RM1,188 per person. Dhesu Travel, since 1988.
meta.keywords: 4 days Bali ATV adventure Malaysia, Bali ATV quad bike tour, Bali sunset dinner cruise Malaysia, Garuda Wisnu Kencana Bali, Penglipuran Village Bali, Dhesu Bali ATV

hero.title: 4 Days Bali
hero.intro: Quad bike through Ubud's jungle, rice fields, and caves in the morning — then cap it all with a Phinisi sunset dinner cruise along Bali's southern coast that same evening. Four days that move from active adventure to total relaxation.

breadcrumb.label: 4 Days ATV Adventure & Sunset Dinner Cruise

hero.heroImageAlt: ATV quad bike adventure through Ubud rice fields and jungle Bali

includes: All meals as specified in itinerary
1-hour tandem ATV ride through jungle and rice fields
Banana boat ride at Tanjung Benoa (complimentary)
excludes: ETIQA Travel Insurance Area 2 Gold RM41
Optional water sports at Tanjung Benoa (jet ski, parasailing, glass-bottom boat)

overview.heading: Four Days Balancing Bali's Adventurous and Serene Sides
body: This package pairs Bali's most thrilling activity — a one-hour ATV quad bike ride through Ubud's jungle trails, cave passages, muddy river crossings, and terraced rice fields — with the island's most atmospheric evening experience: a buffet dinner cruise on a traditional Phinisi wooden schooner at sunset. The contrast is deliberate and it works.

The itinerary builds sensibly across four days. Day one introduces Bali through the ancient Tanah Lot sea temple. Day two delivers the ATV adventure alongside a stop at Penglipuran, one of the world's cleanest villages, and lunch overlooking Kintamani's active volcano. Day three visits Tanjung Benoa for water sports (banana boat is free; others at own cost), the iconic Garuda Wisnu Kencana statue, Melasti Beach, and finally the Phinisi cruise. Day four is a relaxed send-off.

items.title: 1-Hour ATV Quad Bike Ride Through Ubud's Jungle
items.body: The ATV ride is a tandem experience — one person drives while the other enjoys the scenery — covering rice field paths, jungle trails, muddy river crossings, and a dramatic cave passage. Post-ride shower facilities are provided. This is one of Bali's most exhilarating activities and is fully included in the package price.
items.imageAlt: ATV quad bike ride through Ubud jungle rice fields Bali

items.title: Phinisi Sunset Dinner Cruise
items.body: Board a traditional Indonesian Phinisi schooner for an evening cruise along Bali's southern coast. As the sun descends into the Indian Ocean, a full buffet dinner is served on deck with live entertainment. The combination of sea breeze, warm light, and the sound of live music makes this Bali's most atmospheric evening activity.
items.imageAlt: Phinisi sunset dinner cruise Bali southern coast buffet

items.title: Tanah Lot — Bali's Most Photographed Temple
items.body: Tanah Lot is a 16th-century Hindu temple built on a rocky sea stack just off Bali's west coast. At low tide it can be reached on foot; at high tide it stands magnificently alone in the crashing surf. The surrounding clifftop area has cafes and viewpoints, and the sea temple is particularly striking in the late afternoon light.
items.imageAlt: Tanah Lot sea temple Bali rocky islet ocean

items.title: Kintamani Volcano & Lake Batur Views
items.body: Lunch is served at a ridgeline restaurant in Kintamani with a sweeping panoramic view of Mount Batur — an active volcano — and the ancient caldera lake below. At 1,717 metres, Mount Batur's last eruption was in 2000. The combination of the volcanic crater, the crater lake, and the surrounding highland villages makes this one of Bali's most dramatic lunch stops.
items.imageAlt: Mount Batur active volcano crater lake Kintamani Bali panorama

items.title: Penglipuran Village — One of the World's Cleanest Villages
items.body: Penglipuran has been recognised internationally as one of the three cleanest villages in the world. Traditional bamboo gates, uniform house facades, and immaculately swept lanes reflect a community that has preserved its ancestral customs for centuries. Entry fees go directly towards maintaining the village's extraordinary cleanliness and cultural heritage.
items.imageAlt: Penglipuran village traditional bamboo gates Bali

items.title: Garuda Wisnu Kencana — Bali's Iconic Statue
items.body: The Garuda Wisnu Kencana Cultural Park in Bukit Peninsula is home to a 121-metre copper and brass statue of the Hindu god Wisnu astride his mount Garuda — the largest statue in Southeast Asia and the third tallest in the world. The GWK also hosts regular cultural performances and offers sweeping views of Bali's southern peninsula.
items.imageAlt: Garuda Wisnu Kencana GWK statue 121 metres Bukit Peninsula Bali

days.title: Arrive Bali — Tanah Lot Temple & Welcome Dinner
days.description: Your English-speaking driver-guide meets you at Ngurah Rai International Airport. The afternoon heads to Tanah Lot — Bali's most photographed sea temple, perched on a rocky islet just off the west coast. Walk the clifftop paths around the temple complex, take in the dramatic ocean setting, and stay for the late-afternoon light. Then it's dinner at Kuta's Fork Grill Restaurant before hotel check-in.
suggestedActivities: Explore clifftop paths around the temple complex
Dinner at Kuta Fork Grill Restaurant

days.title: ATV Ride, Kintamani Volcano & Penglipuran Village
days.description: The day begins with a drive to Ubud for the ATV quad bike adventure — a full hour of tandem riding through rice fields, jungle trails, muddy river crossings, river paths, and a cave passage. Shower facilities are provided after the ride. A stop at a local coffee plantation follows before lunch at a Kintamani restaurant with a breathtaking panoramic view of active Mount Batur and the ancient crater lake. The afternoon winds down at Penglipuran Village, recognised as one of the world's three cleanest villages, with its traditional bamboo architecture and immaculate lanes. Dinner at Ayam Betutu Khas Bali.
suggestedActivities: 1-hour tandem ATV ride through rice fields, jungle, caves and rivers
Lunch in Kintamani with Mount Batur and Lake Batur views
Dinner at Ayam Betutu Khas Bali

days.title: Water Sports, GWK Statue, Melasti Beach & Phinisi Cruise
days.description: The morning is spent at Tanjung Benoa, Bali's main water sports beach. The complimentary banana boat ride is included; jet skiing, parasailing, glass-bottom boat, wakeboarding, scuba diving, and turtle island visits are available at own expense. The afternoon visits the iconic Garuda Wisnu Kencana Cultural Park — home to a 121-metre statue of Wisnu on Garuda — and Melasti Beach. The evening is the day's centrepiece: boarding the Phinisi schooner for a sunset dinner cruise with buffet, live entertainment, and Bali's coastline disappearing into dusk.
suggestedActivities: Tanjung Benoa water sports — banana boat (free), jet ski, parasailing, glass-bottom boat (own expense)
Phinisi sunset dinner cruise with live entertainment

days.title: Leisure & Departure
days.description: A relaxed final morning with breakfast at the hotel and free time to explore on your own or pick up souvenirs. Your driver-guide transfers you to Ngurah Rai Airport in time for your flight.

whyBook.heading: Why Book Your Bali ATV Adventure Through Dhesu
whyBook.body: Dhesu has been organising Bali adventures for Malaysian travellers since 1988. Every itinerary is fully private — your own driver-guide, your own schedule. The ATV ride, water sports, and sunset cruise are all coordinated so each activity flows smoothly into the next.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency with over 35 years of operations and thousands of satisfied travellers.

points.title: Trusted Since 1988
points.body: Over 35 years arranging Bali trips for Malaysian travellers — we know every road and every guide.

points.title: 100% Private Tours
points.body: Your own guide and vehicle throughout — no group schedules, no strangers on your ATV trail or dinner cruise.

points.title: Group Discounts
points.body: Significant savings for groups of 3, 5 or more adults. Contact us for a group quote.

sections.heading: Bali ATV Tour Package from Malaysia — 4 Days 3 Nights
sections.body: The ATV quad bike adventure at Ubud is one of Bali's most popular active experiences, and this package builds an entire four-day itinerary around it — adding the Phinisi sunset dinner cruise, Tanjung Benoa water sports, and the Kintamani volcanic crater views to create a genuinely well-rounded trip. All tours are 100% private from Malaysia, with daily departures and validity until 31 March 2027.

sections.heading: What to Expect on the Bali ATV Ride
sections.body: The one-hour ATV experience departs from Ubud and covers a varied off-road circuit. Riders navigate through terraced rice fields, narrow jungle paths, muddy river banks, shallow river crossings, and at least one cave passage — all on a tandem quad bike. No prior experience is required. Safety briefing, helmets, and protective gear are provided, and shower facilities are available at the end of the ride.

sections.heading: Garuda Wisnu Kencana — Why It Matters
sections.body: The GWK statue took over 28 years to complete and was finally unveiled in its entirety in 2018. At 121 metres — taller than the Statue of Liberty — it is the third-tallest statue in the world and Bali's most recognisable modern landmark. The cultural park around it hosts daily dance performances and offers a panoramic view of southern Bali that few visitors see from this elevated angle.

items.question: Do I need ATV riding experience?
items.answer: No prior experience is required. The ATV ride is a tandem experience — one person in the party drives while the other rides as a passenger. A safety briefing and basic training are provided before departure. The route is guided throughout.

items.question: What is included in the banana boat at Tanjung Benoa?
items.answer: One complimentary banana boat ride is included in the package. Additional water sports — jet skiing, parasailing, glass-bottom boat, wakeboarding, scuba diving, and turtle island — are available at your own additional expense.

items.question: Is the Phinisi cruise included?
items.answer: Yes. The Phinisi sunset dinner cruise with buffet dinner and live entertainment is fully included in all hotel tiers of this package.

items.question: What should I wear for the ATV ride?
items.answer: Comfortable clothing that you don't mind getting muddy — long trousers and closed-toe shoes are recommended. Helmets and protective gear are provided. A change of clothes is advisable as the ride can get muddy, particularly on rainy days.

items.question: Can children participate in the ATV ride?
items.answer: Children can ride as passengers on the tandem ATV (minimum age and height restrictions may apply from the operator). Please enquire with Dhesu at the time of booking for specific age and weight requirements.
